title: The Mediation Of Christ
summary: “For there is one God, and one mediator between God and men, the man Christ Jesus” (1 Timothy 2:5). James Strong defines the Greek word mesitēs (mediator) as “one who intervenes between two, either in order to make or restore peace and friendship, or form a compact, or for ratifying a covenant.” Ever since the Fall of Adam and Eve, God has repeatedly tried to reconcile humanity with himself. Let us consider some of the ways he has done this.
